name: Horn of Blasting
description:
A horn of blasting is a bright brass trumpet. It can be played as an instrument, granting a +2 item bonus to your Performance check.

Activate 1 Interact

Frequency once per round

Effect Blowing into the horn with destructive intent, you create a blast note targeting one creature within 30 feet. The blast deals ] damage ( save).

Activate 2 Interact

Frequency once per day

Effect You blow even louder to create an intense blast wave in a that deals |options:area-damage] damage. Each creature attempts a save with the following effects.

Critical Success The creature takes no damage.

Success The creature takes half damage.

Failure The creature takes full damage and is for [[/gmr 2d6 #rounds]]{2d6 rounds}.
